urdu transliteration text:
Dhoondne nikle the jo dunya me haider dusra
Mil nahi paya unhe ab tak qalandar dusra
english translation text:
Those who were out trying to look for another Haider
Until today, they have not even been able to find another ‘Qalandar’ (servant of Ali)

urdu transliteration text:
Hai kahaan jibreel jo rizwaan laaya hai libaas
Kya ali ne rakhliya hai ghar me nokar dusra
english translation text:
Where is Jibrael that another angel had brought the clothes to the house
Has Ali kept another servant now in the house?

urdu transliteration text:
Hum tumhe dikhlaenge yusuf Ali ki aal me
Tum na dikhla paaoge nabiyon me akbar dusra
english translation text: We will show you a Yusuf in the family of Ali You however will not be able to show us another Akbar amongst the prophets

urdu transliteration text:
Le to aaye hai saqeefa waale Rehbar dusra
Laaenge lekin kahaan se khum ka mimbar dusra
english translation text:
The people of saqeefa have brought another leader
But how will they bring another Mimbar of Ghadeer e Khum

urdu transliteration text:
Teghon ke saaaye me sona bas Ali ki baat hai
Bhaag hi jata agar, hota wahan per doosra
english translation text:
To sleep under the shadow of swords is only something Ali will do
If there was any other person there - he would have run away

urdu transliteration text:
Jab nabi kehte the khayber me koi jaakar lare
Dekhta tha ek ko foran palat kar doosra
english translation text:
When the prophet said in Khaybar, go and fight
Immediately one would turn to another and say, you first!
